channel.title: Pages on Field Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Field Notes

item.title: About
item.description:
You have arrived at Field Notes.

This place collects Signals & Traces–observations, artifacts, questions, memories, and things that felt worth noticing. Some becoming stories. Some remaining fragments.

Signals & Traces

A notebook for observations before they disappear.

The Library

A portal to my collection of books & comics. Contact the librarian for a library card.

Archives

Older paths through the notebook.

Tags

Trail markers connecting related ideas across time. There is no prescribed route through this place.

Guestbook

A space for notes left by visiting travelers. Notes are written through GitHub Discussions. A free GitHub account is required to sign the ledger.

Follow your curiosity.

item.title: Guestbook
item.description:
You have arrived at the Guestbook.

A ledger rests near the entrance.

Travelers sometimes leave a note before continuing on.

Notes are written through GitHub Discussions. A free GitHub account is required to sign the ledger.

item.title: Library
item.description:
You have arrived at the library.

Books, comics, field guides, manuals, maps, and other accumulated artifacts live here.

The librarian can usually be found at the front desk, if they’re not off wandering the stacks.

Visitors will need a library card to browse the collection. If you’d like one, simply ask an account can be created for you.

Enter the library

item.title: Signals & Traces
item.description:
You have arrived at Signals & Traces.

This is where things land first.

Notes, observations, questions, songs, photographs, conversations, links, and half-finished thoughts gather here while they are still close at hand.

If you’d like to know what I’m currently reading, watching, listening to, building, or thinking about, you’ll likely find it here.

Some traces become longer field notes. Some remain fragments.

The real treasure often lives here.

Now playing

  • No Doubt
  • Deadmou5

Now Reading

  • The Wicked + The Divine

Now Watching

  • Punky Brewster
  • Masters of the Universe
  • Tales from the Crypt
  • House Party 1-3

Now Thinking

  • Will-o-the-wisp adventures often end up right where you started, only a little more aware of the landscape…if you turn back in time.
  • Learning best is learning slowly.

Several blank pages remain.
